creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Riccardo Torrini <riccardo.torrini@esaote.com> -----

From: Riccardo Torrini <riccardo.torrini@esaote.com>
To: Attilio Rao <attilio@freebsd.org>
Cc: freebsd-stable@freebsd.org, siedar@nplay.pl, scottl@freebsd.org,
	Riccardo Torrini <riccardo.torrini@esaote.com>,
	John Baldwin <jhb@freebsd.org>
Subject: Re: kern/130330: [mpt] [panic] Panic and reboot machine MPT ...

On Thu, May 21, 2009 at 11:47:54AM +0200, Attilio Rao wrote:

> Please try the patch here:
> http://www.freebsd.org/~attilio/notify.diff

As promised I checked againts 7.2-STABLE of today (cvsup ended
at 15:17 CEST, GTM+2, Italy time with DST) and ... it works !
(added and removed a disk 4 times, even during a sync-in-progress)
